caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a gray acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional condenser microphone, held by a shock mount and a boom arm labeled "Rode PodMic," is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and expressions shifting as he talks. He occasionally gestures with his right arm, which features a tattoo on the shoulder and upper arm. In the final moments, his arm moves quickly across the frame in a sweeping motion, creating a slight blur as he emphasizes a point. The camera remains in a static medium close-up shot, capturing his upper body and the recording equipment.
